extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ Primož attacked with 300m to go on the finishing circuit climb, rounded YATES and pulled clear for the win over ALAPHILIPPE and YATES.
tactical_patterns: ALAPHILIPPE Julian attacked early on penultimate climb lap as tactical marker, signaling form ahead of classics season.
ROGLIČ went twice in final 300m, first attempt blocked then immediately re-attacked to exploit hesitation from YATES.
UAE's YATES Adam positioned perfectly on Roglič wheel but couldn't respond to second acceleration with 300m remaining.
Jumbo-Visma executed Plan B when plan A (VAN AERT presumably) failed, showing tactical flexibility mid-race.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: showed explosive finishing power on short steep finish after 218km, different weapon than expected
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: strong enough to attack penultimate lap and finish second, rapid form return pre-classics
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: perfect positioning but lacked final punch when Roglič accelerated twice in 300m
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Tom: negative: struggled positioning before crash with Van Aert, already off pace before mechanical incident
rider_signals.LAFAY Victor: positive: matched Roglič acceleration to finish fourth, punchy climb suits better than expected
rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: positive: animated late with McCarthy dragging him into position, showing improved form
